author: Vaillant Samuel
subject: v5.1.0
body: # [5.1.0](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v5.0.3...v5.1.0) (2018-05-28) ### Bug Fixes * **connectInfiniteHits:** always set a value for previous page ([algolia/react-instantsearch#1195](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/1195)) ([98e9ce8](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/98e9ce8)) * **indexUtils:** avoid throw an error on cleanUp multi indices ([algolia/react-instantsearch#1265](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/1265)) ([88e2df2](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/88e2df2)) ### Features * **searchClient:** Add support for custom Search Clients ([algolia/react-instantsearch#1216](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/1216)) ([ab9d088](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/ab9d088))
